response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished generalist engineer, but the profile does not match the core requirements of this role. Hands-on C++ is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI components) plus an academic thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure — RIDE Capital was an investing fintech built on Node/TypeScript/GraphQL, not a capital-markets C++ environment. The strong TypeScript/Node/DLang background does not substitute for the mandatory C++ and financial-domain criteria.
strengths: Broad, deep software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong testing/craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Some low-level/C++ exposure at National Instruments and prior systems work
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) versus the required 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server/Oracle and no fixed income or capital-markets/IB domain knowledge
Tech stack centers on JS/TS/DLang/web, misaligned with the role's core requirements
